## event\_target class

事件对象（类型安全）

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare class mk_event_target<CT> extends cc.EventTarget 
```
**Extends:** cc.EventTarget

## Remarks

- 获取事件键使用 event\_target.key.xxx

|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [key](./key/) |  | { \[k in keyof CT\]: k; } | 事件键 |
